strategy: Attack with Death or Fire (+35%); he resists Life 80%. He is stunable and beguilable, so stuns buy setup time.
Every 3 rounds he Weaknesses the whole team, so pack Cleanse Charm, or blade over the weakness before the hitter goes.
He also Dispels a random wizard every few rounds, so do not over-rely on a single aura or charm the hitter needs; set up the round you hit.
Clear the Brume Goblin minion with an AoE or focus the boss.
Funnel blades to the hitter, Cleanse weaknesses off them, then burst with a boosted Death or Fire hit.
cheatNotes: Every 3 rounds he throws Weakness cards on all wizards. Cleanse them off the hitter or blade over them before attacking.
Every few rounds he Dispels a random wizard, so set up on the same round you hit rather than banking buffs.
